name: marky-skills
description: Run your social media from your AI agent. Marky writes, designs, schedules, and publishes on-brand posts; these skills and the bundled MCP server teach any agent to drive it.

plugins.name: marky
plugins.description: Agent skills for managing social media with Marky: authenticate and connect the API/MCP, create and schedule posts, plan a week of on-brand content, manage topics and your library, review performance, and repurpose what works.
